name: Maintenance SLA Breach
query:
SELECT
    name as "Request:Link/Maintenance Request:130",
    camp as "Camp:Link/Camp Master:120",
    block as "Block:Link/Block Master:120",
    room as "Room:Link/Room Master:110",
    priority as "Priority::90",
    status as "Status::100",
    assigned_technician as "Technician:Link/Employee:130",
    target_resolution_date as "Target Date:Date:110",
    sla_due_datetime as "SLA Due:Datetime:150"
FROM `tabMaintenance Request`
WHERE is_overdue = 1
    AND docstatus < 2
    AND (%(camp)s = '' OR camp = %(camp)s)
ORDER BY target_resolution_date ASC
